code:
import io
import string

fn factorial(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n <= 1
    1
  else
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = string.parse_int(trimmed).ok_or("invalid input")?
  let r = factorial(n)
  print("#{n}!=#{r}")
  Ok(())
end
